inputs.label: Parts Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of replacement parts from supplier or OEM catalog. Based on industry standard parts pricing.

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Estimated time for repair based on standard labor time guides (e.g., Mitchell, Chilton).

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Shop's hourly labor charge. Varies by region and shop type (dealership vs independent).

inputs.label: Shop Supplies Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fee for consumables like lubricants, rags, etc. Common practice in auto repair.

inputs.label: Hazardous Waste Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fee for disposal of hazardous materials (oil, batteries). Regulatory compliance.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage for parts and supplies. Based on local tax laws.

inputs.label: Discount Percent
inputs.businessContext: Optional discount on total quote (e.g., loyalty or promotional discount).

inputs.label: Customer Type
inputs.businessContext: Determines pricing tier. Insurance jobs may have negotiated rates. Based on industry practice.

rules: if customerType == 'wholesale' then discountPercent >= 10 else discountPercent >= 0

thresholds.laborHours > 8: Long job; consider break into multiple days
thresholds.partsCost > 1000: High parts cost; verify with customer

hiddenLossDrivers: laborHours > 8 ? 'Long job; consider break into multiple days' : ''
partsCost > 1000 ? 'High parts cost; verify with customer' : ''
suggestedActions: Verify parts availability and pricing with supplier
Check for warranty or customer discounts
Ensure hazardous waste fee complies with local regulations

premiumFeatures: Detailed Report with Labor Time Breakdown
